Numref Test
===========

See :numref:`fig-example` for a figure and :numref:`tbl-example` for a
table.

An explicit title like :numref:`Custom figure %s <fig-example>` keeps
Sphinx's text substitution.

.. figure:: picture.png
   :name: fig-example

   An example figure

.. table:: An example table
   :name: tbl-example

   ===== =====
   A     B
   ===== =====
   1     2
   ===== =====
